purpose: machine-readable inspect-first recovery classification for apply ambiguity

requires: journal evidence proving completion is safe
journal evidence proving rollback is safe

blocked_cases: fresh live hashes do not match the journaled target
the journal cannot prove a safe finish or rollback
the claim lease has expired and the worker is fenced
required_invariants: journal rows carry claim ownership, generation, and lease expiry
fresh live hashes are required before mutating recovery
stale dry-run evidence must not be promoted into recovery authority
